summary.blockedReason: CYBERSOURCE_DECLINED test card (4000000000000002) does NOT actually decline in this environment's CyberSource test mode — verified by attempting order placement which succeeded as CO260504-00031 ($299.99). All 7 decline-related test cases (PAY-DECLINE-001 through 007) require a card that produces a real decline response from the gateway.

testCases.title: Payment Form - Field Labels and Placeholders
testCases.notes: All 4 fields have visible labels with required asterisk: 'Card number*', 'Cardholder name*', 'Expiration date*', 'Security code*'. Placeholders: card='1111 1111 1111 1111', expiry='MM / YYYY', CVV='•••'. Cardholder has aria-label='Cardholder name'. Card brand icons (Visa/MC/Amex) displayed.

testCases.title: Payment Form - Keyboard Tab Order
testCases.notes: DOM tab order: Card iframe (idx=31) → Cardholder name (32) → Expiry (33) → CVV iframe (34). All have tabindex=0 (or default). No tab traps detected via DOM analysis. Iframe focus uses standard browser cross-origin tab behavior.

testCases.title: Payment Form - Load Time Under 2 Seconds
testCases.notes: CyberSource flex-microform.min.js loaded in 350 ms; iframe.html (both card + CVV) in ~577 ms each. Time from script start to iframe render = 930 ms. Well under 2000 ms threshold. No failed resource loads.

testCases.title: Double-Click Place Order Prevention
testCases.failedAssertion: [ASSERT] Only one order is created — check order confirmation shows single order number
testCases.notes: DUPLICATE ORDERS CREATED. Two synchronous click() calls (3.4 ms apart) created two real orders: CO260504-00029 and CO260504-00030, both $319.19, sequential payment invoices PI260504-00031/00032. MutationObserver captured DOM disabled attribute applied AFTER both clicks — no synchronous in-handler guard. See BUG-041-001.

testCases.title: Declined Card - Error Message Displayed
testCases.blockedReason: Test data unavailable: CYBERSOURCE_DECLINED card 4000000000000002 does NOT decline in this environment — verified by placing order which succeeded as CO260504-00031 ($299.99). No card in test-cards.csv produces a guaranteed decline. Suggest provisioning a decline-trigger card from CyberSource sandbox docs (e.g., 4000000000009995) or Sandbox simulator amounts.

testCases.title: Declined Card - Retry with Different Card Succeeds
testCases.blockedReason: Depends on PAY-DECLINE-001 reaching declined state — see PAY-DECLINE-001 BLOCKED reason. No usable decline card in this environment.

testCases.title: Declined Card - Network Timeout Recovery
testCases.blockedReason: Requires DevTools network blocking which Playwright MCP browser tools cannot perform mid-flight without separate Chrome DevTools MCP. Skipped to preserve quota; suggest running this with Chrome DevTools MCP via qa-testing-expert.

testCases.title: Declined Card - Double-Click Prevention After Error
testCases.blockedReason: Cannot reach decline state — see PAY-DECLINE-001 reason. NOTE: PAY-EDGE-001 already proved double-click guard is BROKEN even on success path; same defect almost certainly applies post-decline. See BUG-041-001.

testCases.title: Declined Card - Cart and Checkout State Preserved
testCases.blockedReason: Cannot reach decline state — see PAY-DECLINE-001 reason.

testCases.title: Guest Checkout - CyberSource Payment Completes Without Account
testCases.notes: Guest session verified (Sign in / Sign up now visible in header, no Account menu, no auth redirect). Cart accessible without login. Payment Details section visible. Payment dropdown lists all 4 processors including Bank card (CyberSource). Place Order button is gated by required address selection (standard guard, same as authenticated flow), NOT by authentication wall — BL-CHK-005 satisfied. Full guest order placement to confirmation deferred (would require seeded address) — but the BL-PAY-003/BL-CHK-005 invariant 'no authentication wall before payment form' is confirmed.

testCases.title: Guest Checkout - Payment Validation Same as Authenticated User
testCases.notes: As guest with CyberSource selected: Place Order button is disabled (data-test-id='place-order-button' has disabled=true) when shipping address + delivery method missing — same guard as authenticated. CyberSource Microform iframe form does not render until shipping address is provided (gating mechanism is identical to authenticated context). Validation patterns match authenticated user behavior verified in PAY-CS-005/006 (suite 039). No 'guest-mode' validation bypass detected.

testCases.title: Cross-Layer - Order Total at Checkout Matches Gateway Charge Amount
testCases.notes: Order CO260504-00029 detail: Subtotal $116.00 - Discount $0.01 + Tax $53.20 + Shipping $150.00 = $319.19. Math verified consistent on (a) cart page total, (b) order confirmation list ($319.19 in account/orders), and (c) order detail page total. Payment Method shown as 'Bank card (CyberSource)'. BL-CHK-006 satisfied. Note: cart subtotal displayed $115.99 vs order detail $116.00 (rounding artifact of 0.01 discount); final totals match exactly. Network-level gateway-amount verification consumed in suite 039 PAY-CS-001.

testCases.title: Declined Card Recovery - CyberSource Error Then Retry With Valid Card
testCases.blockedReason: Cannot reach decline state — see PAY-DECLINE-001 reason.

testCases.title: Multiple Consecutive Declines Preserve Checkout State
testCases.blockedReason: Cannot reach decline state — see PAY-DECLINE-001 reason.

bugs.title: Double-click on Place Order creates DUPLICATE orders (CyberSource)
bugs.stepsToReproduce: 1. Sign in. 2. Add 2 items to cart. 3. Select Bank card (CyberSource) payment. 4. Fill valid card 4622943127013705 / 09/2029 / 838 / John Smith. 5. Programmatically dispatch two click() events on the Place Order button within the same JS tick (or rapid mouse double-click). 6. Wait 10s. 7. Check /account/orders.
bugs.expected: Only ONE createOrderFromCart mutation; only ONE order in history (BL-CHK-003 / BL-PAY-005).
bugs.actual: TWO orders created with identical contents and totals: CO260504-00029 and CO260504-00030, both $319.19, sequential payment IDs PI260504-00031/00032.
bugs.rootCauseHypothesis: Vue reactive disabled binding applied AFTER both synchronous click handlers ran. No in-handler guard flag to bail second click.
bugs.fix: Add synchronous guard: `if (isPlacingOrder) return; isPlacingOrder = true;` at the very top of the place-order handler.

cleanupRequired: CO260504-00029 — DUPLICATE from BUG-041-001 — cancel via admin
CO260504-00030 — DUPLICATE from BUG-041-001 — cancel via admin
CO260504-00031 — Test order from PAY-DECLINE-001 attempt (non-decline path) — cancel via admin

[PRE:RESET_CART] — cart was emptied between PAY-EDGE-001 and PAY-DECLINE-001 by successful order placement
notes: Suite 041 — RETRY of REG-2026-05-04-1527 (first attempt aborted by quota at ~6 min). Time budget management: incremental partial JSON written after the FAIL on PAY-EDGE-001 to preserve work. BUG-041-001 is a P0 critical defect — duplicate orders from double-click violates BL-CHK-003 / BL-PAY-005 / ECL-1.2. Decline-test coverage (7 cases) BLOCKED by lack of working decline test card; recommend provisioning a known-decline card or amount-trigger in CyberSource sandbox before re-running this suite.
